message: What do you think of this spacious area?
It’s pretty enviable. With this much space, you could probably shoot a movie here, right?
Yeah, I’ve been thinking about that too. After all, this is my pride.
Actually, the reason I wanted to host a party like today’s was to show off this room.
Is that so?
Yeah, so when I get compliments, it still makes me happy.
As expected from a director's pride, I think it’s definitely usable for film shoots.
It also has a vibe reminiscent of a hotel lobby.
What do you think? Adding those big flowers makes it even more glamorous, right?
Yes, you’re absolutely right.
Yeah, yeah, I love this glamorous atmosphere.
I made this space hoping it could be used for movie shoots someday.
I also thought that would be possible.
Is that so? I honestly thought this hall was too lavish for just an ordinary film director.
The glamour of this hall creates an illusion of being in a movie scene.
I’m glad you feel it just as intended.
Did you have this in mind for shooting when you created this hall?
Since it’s a home party, the style is quite casual.
Perhaps it wasn’t meant to be a semi-formal kind of party.
It's hard to believe that this person with a gentle, kind smile could be so scary during filming.
With such an imposing and dignified appearance, that's to be expected.
A Hollywood master.
That’s what they say.
Is it because of the two beautiful actresses who joined that he’s showing a slightly more gentle expression than before?
I heard you're best friends with Guy.
Yeah, it's more like a rotten connection or whatever.
It’s more like a bad friendship.
You should cherish your friends. As for me, I realized I had lost my friends before I knew it.
Huh?
I got so caught up in work that I ended up with no one I could truly call a friend.
I released my first film ten years ago. My debut as a director was quite late.
Is that so?
I debuted as a director at 35. That’s pretty late, right?
However, that might have helped me create good works.
It’s what they call the wisdom of age, ha ha ha.
I lost my wife soon after I started directing.
I regret that I couldn’t give her anything but hardships.
Your feelings are reaching your wife in heaven.
I hope so, but I’ve been doing things that would probably upset her.
It’s really unfortunate.
I know you’re not comfortable in this kind of situation, but relax. It’d be foolish not to enjoy it since you came all this way.
Yes. I’ll make sure to enjoy it.
Yeah, yeah. I like people like you. Your answers are clear and refreshing.
If you don’t mind, could you get along with my daughter?
The actors have finally gathered, but this could be quite a challenge. I just hope nothing happens.
Sounds like you think something could go wrong.
Yeah. There are many who can’t stand each other. I wonder why they can’t just get along.
Right now, my main concern is the movie.
We’re about to start filming.
This time it’s a different genre.
Since we're exploring new territory, it's really hitting me mentally.
The pressure is bigger than ever, and it's really bothering me.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
